cc:work.dc:title: MapChart Map
cc:work.dc:description: This map was created with MapChart.net, a website for creating custom maps.

path.style: font-variation-settings: normal; vector-effect: none; fill: rgb(209, 219, 221); fill-opacity: 1; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 0.1; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-opacity: 1; stop-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); shape-rendering: auto;
